mapper.select: select id, type, title, content, is_read as isRead, order_id as orderId, create_time as createTime from notice where is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc

select id, type, title, content, is_read as isRead, order_id as orderId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from notice where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select count(1) from notice where is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update notice set is_read = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update notice set is_read = 1 where is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0
